keys.description: Stripe API version. Bump on Stripe's major-version changes.
Stripe API base URL. Override for regional deployments.
Default capture_method for new intents. 'automatic' = capture on authorization. 'manual' = authorization hold (requires payment_manual_capture entitlement).
Per-provider HTTP timeout for capture calls. Longer than the standard HTTP timeout because captures involve provider async processing.
Card transactions above this amount require 3DS2. Default €30 (3000 cents) matches PSD2 SCA threshold. Tenants can override per-region if their acquiring bank has different thresholds.
Currencies for which 3DS2 is enforced above the threshold. PSD2 applies primarily to EEA + UK + Switzerland.
Country codes for which 3DS2 is force-required regardless of amount. Tenant can populate based on their fraud data.
Risk score threshold for auto-approve. Payments with provider risk_score < this value auto-approve. Above → route to fraud review queue (delegated to provider Radar-equivalent).
Risk-review band. Payments in this range surface to admin for manual review before capture.
Cron schedule for the nightly ReconcilePaymentIntentsJob. Default: 03:00 UTC nightly.
How far back to poll provider intent lists for drift detection.
Baseline drift count for alerting. Any finding above this fires PaymentReconcileDriftNotification.
payments retention. 10 years for Enterprise tenants with payment_extended_retention entitlement.
payment_disputes retention. 10 years for Enterprise.
payment_intents retention (transient state; success → creates payment; failure → audit only).
Soft-deleted payment_methods retained this many days before hard-purge.
ExpireStalePaymentIntentsJob marks intents in non-terminal status for longer than this as 'cancelled' with cancellation_reason='expired'.
NotifyDisputeEvidenceDueJob fires this many days before evidence_due_by.
Disputes with amount_cents >= this threshold fire as P1 notifications (paged on-call). Default $500.
CollectDisputeEvidenceJob reads communication_log from the notifications module for this many trailing days.
Current encryption key version for TokenEncryptor. Bump on rotation. Historical rows carry their own key_version for backward-compat decryption.
Encryption key version for payment_intents.client_secret. Distinct from token_key_version — defense-in-depth.
